OverHistory.NewCommentry: Khaleel Ahmed to Priyansh Arya 1 (WD)
OverHistory.Commentry: Khaleel Ahmed bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Priyansh Arya leg glances it, 1 wide(s) gets added to the extras
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: LEFT ARM PACE TO START THE PROCEEDINGS WITH THE BALL FOR CSK!  Khaleel Ahmed bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Priyansh Arya leg glances it, 1 wide(s) gets added to the extras

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Khaleel Ahmed to Priyansh Arya - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Khaleel Ahmed bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on off stump, Priyansh Arya drives it straight aggressively using the front foot for 4 runs towards Straight Long-On
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: STRAIGHT BAT STROKEPLAY NEVER GOES OUT OF FASHION!  Khaleel Ahmed bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on off stump and swinging in, Priyansh Arya presents the full face of the bat and drives it straight back past the bowler for a boundary! That swung in late and Arya was upto the challenge!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Khaleel Ahmed to Priyansh Arya - SIX RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Khaleel Ahmed bowling to Priyansh Arya, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Priyansh Arya plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot for 6 runs towards Country
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: SOME HORIZONTAL STROKEPLAY ON DISPLAY THIS TIME!  Khaleel Ahmed bowling to Priyansh Arya, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Priyansh Arya predicts the length early and smashes the horizontal pull shot over mid-wicket for the first maximum of the second innings!

THAT FIRST OVER GOES FOR 14!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Matt Henry to Priyansh Arya - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on off stump, Priyansh Arya uncomfortably  plays an aggressive cut shot for 4 runs
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: EDGED FOR FOUR!  Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on off stump, Priyansh Arya gets an outside edge while looking to slash at it. That goes wide of the Keeper and well wide of short third man too. Arya won't mind that!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Matt Henry to Priyansh Arya - SIX RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, short of good length ball, pitching outside leg stump, Priyansh Arya plays an aggressive pull shot on the front foot for 6 runs towards Deep Mid-Wicket
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: CAN'T BOWL SHORT TO HIM! HE DOES FANCY THE PULL!  Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, short of good length ball, pitching outside leg stump, Priyansh Arya once again was quick onto pick that length which allows him to pull freely. Gets the desired connection and the result too!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Matt Henry to Priyansh Arya - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Priyansh Arya plays an aggressive off drive on the front foot for 4 runs towards Long-Off
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: AHEAD OF THE BOWLER AT THE MOMENT PRIYANSH ARYA!  Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Priyansh Arya creates a bit of room outside off and plays an uppish drive wide of extra covers for a boundary! He is guessing the bowler's length to perfection at the moment!

OverHistory.Commentry: Matt Henry bowling to Prabhsimran Singh, good length ball, pitching on off stump, Prabhsimran Singh plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot for 4 runs towards Deep Fine Leg
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: PRABHSIMRAN JOINS THE PARTY!  Matt Henry bowling to Prabhsimran Singh, good length ball, pitching on off stump, Prabhsimran Singh shuffles a little and plays a swivel pull well enough to make it reach the fine leg fence. This is turning out to be an expensive over!

OverHistory.Commentry: Khaleel Ahmed bowling to Priyansh Arya, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Priyansh Arya plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot for 6 runs towards Deep Square Leg
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: THIRD MAXIMUM FROM THE BAT OF PRIYANSH ARYA!  Khaleel Ahmed bowling to Priyansh Arya, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Priyansh Arya once again plays his favourtite shot that is the pull shot to collect six runs. That one went high and went the distance too over deep square leg!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Anshul Kamboj to Prabhsimran Singh - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Anshul Kamboj bowling to Prabhsimran Singh, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Prabhsimran Singh plays a slog shot for 4 runs towards Straight Long-Off
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: ON-SLAUGHT FROM BOTH THE ENDS!   Anshul Kamboj bowling to Prabhsimran Singh, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Prabhsimran Singh smacks it back towards the bowler who gets a hand to it but lets it go through. That one was hit hard by the pocket powerhouse from Punjab!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Anshul Kamboj to Prabhsimran Singh - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Anshul Kamboj bowling to Prabhsimran Singh, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Prabhsimran Singh plays an aggressive lofted on drive on the front foot for 4 runs towards Straight Long-On
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: BACK TO BACK FOURS!   Anshul Kamboj bowling to Prabhsimran Singh, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Prabhsimran Singh once again stands tall and hammers it down the ground, this time well over the bowler's head.

OverHistory.UPDCommentry: SLICED AWAY FOR A BOUNDARY!  Anshul Kamboj bowling to Prabhsimran Singh, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Prabhsimran Singh plays a lofted drive, the bat face opens in the hands and ultimately ends up slicing it over point for another four!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Matt Henry to Priyansh Arya - SIX RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Priyansh Arya plays an aggressive lofted straight shot on the front foot for 6 runs towards Straight Long-On
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: JUST WATCH AND ADMIRE!  Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Priyansh Arya stands still, presents the full face of the bat and lofts it down the ground for half a dozen! That is a quality stroke from the southpaw from Delhi!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Matt Henry to Priyansh Arya Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Priyansh Arya steps down and plays an aggressive lofted on drive WICKET Priyansh Arya b Matt Henry (Punjab Kings 61 Runs for 1 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
SOUND OF TIMBER!  Matt Henry bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Priyansh Arya misses out on a step down long heave towards the on-side. Gets beaten for pace and the woodwork is disturbed! Matt Henry is fired-up!
WICKET Priyansh Arya b Matt Henry (Punjab Kings 61 Runs for 1 wicket)

How good was he timing the ball ????????

Priyansh Arya looked in terrific touch ????

He goes back for an entertaining 39(11) ????????

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Noor Ahmad to Prabhsimran Singh Wicket

OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
FINALLY SOMETHING GOOD FOR CSK ON A GOOD FRIDAY!  Noor Ahmad bowling to Prabhsimran Singh, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Prabhsimran Singh tucks it towards the on-side with soft hands and calls for two but Connolly turns back after saying 'yes'. Prabhsimran had no chance to get back to the bowling end thereafter as a throw from Sarfaraz was spot on for Ruturaj to take the bails off.
WICKET Prabhsimran Singh run out Sarfaraz Khan (Punjab Kings 95 Runs for 2 wickets)

CONNOLLY MISSES OUT THIS TIME!  Anshul Kamboj bowling to Cooper Connolly, full toss ball, outside off stump, Cooper Connolly miscues the lofted hit and ends up giving a dolly into the hands of Henry stationed at long off. That was a poor delivery but gets an important wicket! 
WICKET Cooper Connolly c Matt Henry b Anshul Kamboj (Punjab Kings 127 Runs for 3 wickets)

OverHistory.UPDCommentry: ANOTHER EDGE ANOTHER FOUR!  Matt Henry bowling to Shashank Singh, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Shashank Singh this time gives it his all but gets an outside edge which once again flies over short third. Four nevertheless!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Anshul Kamboj to Shashank Singh - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Anshul Kamboj bowling to Shashank Singh, full toss ball, outside off stump, Shashank Singh aggressively plays a square drive on the front foot for 4 runs towards Deep Backward Point
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: GOOD CONNECTION THIS TIME!  Anshul Kamboj bowling to Shashank Singh, full toss ball, outside off stump, Shashank Singh reaches out for it and slices it behind point for a boundary! This is poor bowling from the Super Kings!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Anshul Kamboj to Marcus Stoinis - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Anshul Kamboj bowling to Marcus Stoinis, full length ball, pitching on off stump, Marcus Stoinis plays an aggressive lofted straight shot on the front foot for 4 runs towards Straight Long-Off
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
STOINIS FINISHES THINGS OFF IN STYLE!  PBKS WIN BY 5 WICKETS!  Anshul Kamboj bowling to Marcus Stoinis, full length ball, pitching on off stump, Marcus Stoinis stands tall and drills the slot ball over the bowler's head for a boundary! 
PBKS making chasing look easy with their fearless batting approach!
